name: Chávez, Hugo
source_notes:
Georgiana quotes Vania Norberto of Brazil for a time of 17:10 from Chavez himself to a Venezuelan astrologer. Monica Dimino, who practiced astrology in Venezuela for many years and retains a huge clientele there wrote: "Hugo Chavez, born July 28, 1954, at 3:30 AM in Sabaneta, Venezuela (8N46, 69W56).  The date is well known and established.  The hour was given to me by a Chavez acquaintance back in the early 90's when he was arrested for a failed coup.  At the time, I was told that Chavez had revealed his birth hour to her because he wanted her to consult an astrologer for him.  I did not accept that request because I was dealing with family health issues at the time." 

In December 2007 Sy Scholfield quotes a time of 4 AM from  Orlando Albornoz's book, "Academic Populism: Higher Education Policies Under State Control" (Caracas: Universidad Central de Venezuela, 2005), p. 719: "In one unforgettable opportunity on state TV, the President's mother had to explain the time and the circumstances surrounding his birth. By the way, he was born at 4 am, in the middle of unusual rains and winds."
Carlos Dum, astrologer in Caracas, Venezuela, writes in an article [http://www.universo.com.ve/web/articulos/chavez_nac.html] that he called Chavez' mother on the phone: "Luego de colgar a mi interlocutora, decidí llamar al número telefónico que me dieron con serial del interior del país donde tuve la suerte de ser atendido a la primera por la propia madre de Chávez, Doña Elena. Después de las debidas presentaciones y el motivo de la llamada, la pregunta: ¿A qué hora nació su hijo el candidato?... La  misma, con voz suave y pausada respondió: “Yo de Huguito no recuerdo bien la hora de su nacimiento, pero si le puedo asegurar que nació entre las 03:00 y 05:00 de la madrugada”. (I do not remember the hour of his birth well, but I can assure you that is was between 3 and 5 am)."
Dum himself corrects the time to 3:25, and we leave it in the middle of the two-hour period, leaving an uncertainty of 1 hour. The Cancer ascendant lasts from 3:35 to 5:40.
In September 2022 Scholfield notes that Chavez gives "2 AM" quoted from his birth certificate in the book ''Hugo Chávez. Mi primera vida: Conversaciones con Hugo Chávez'' (Hugo Chavez. My First Life: Conversations with Hugo Chavez) by Ignacio Ramonet (Penguin Random House, 2014): "Mucha agua, mucha lluvia, y nazco el miércoles 28 de julio “a las dos de la madrugada”, dice la partida de nacimiento." (A lot of water, a lot of rain, and I was born on Wednesday, 28 July “at two in the morning”, says the birth certificate.).
